mapper.insert:
INSERT /*+ APPEND PARALLEL(KRBA_TRN_I 6) */ INTO KRBA_TRN_I ( BAS_YYMM, GNL_AC_NO, SRVC_G_C, DL_DT, DL_SQ, GDS_NO, RNMCNO, CHNL_CLSN_CODE, DL_CHNNL_CD, DL_TYP_CD, DL_WY_CD, ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE, PRDT_CLSN_CODE, SERV_CLSN_CODE, HANDLNG_BRN_CD, MNGG_BRN_CD, PRFT_BRN_CD, VALT_BRNO, DL_AMT, PECO_TRN_CD, TRDG_CODE,BNCC_TRN_YN,CRDT_TRN_YN, DR_DT, DR_TIME ) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(M 6) */ BAS_YYMM ,GNL_AC_NO ,(CASE WHEN ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = 'P01' THEN '01' WHEN ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = 'P02' THEN '02' WHEN ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = 'P03' THEN '03' WHEN ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = 'P04' THEN '04' WHEN ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = 'P05' THEN '05' WHEN ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = 'P06' THEN '06' WHEN ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = 'P07' THEN '07' WHEN ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = 'P08' THEN '08' WHEN ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = 'P09' THEN '09' WHEN ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE = 'P10' THEN '10' ELSE '*' END ) SRVC_G_C ,'2025' || SUBSTR(DL_DT,5,4) AS DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,GDS_NO ,RNMCNO ,CHNL_CLSN_CODE ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_TYP_CD ,DL_WY_CD ,ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE --계좌유형분류 ,PRDT_CLSN_CODE --금융상품분류 ,SERV_CLSN_CODE --금융서비스분류 ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD --처리지점 ,MNGG_BRN_CD --관리지점 ,PRFT_BRN_CD --실적지점
,(CASE WHEN PRFT_BRN_CD = '21320' THEN MNGG_BRN_CD ELSE NVL(PRFT_BRN_CD,MNGG_BRN_CD) END) VALT_BRNO ,DL_AMT ,PECO_TRN_CD ,TRDG_CODE ,BNCC_TRN_YN ,CRDT_TRN_YN ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT #{basYymm} BAS_YYMM ,GNL_AC_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,GDS_NO ,RNMCNO ,CHNL_CLSN_CODE ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_TYP_CD ,DL_WY_CD ,ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE --계좌유형분류 ,PRDT_CLSN_CODE --금융상품분류 ,SERV_CLSN_CODE --금융서비스분류 ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD --처리지점 ,MNGG_BRN_CD --관리지점 ,PRFT_BRN_CD --실적지점 ,DL_AMT ,PECO_TRN_CD ,TRDG_CODE ,BNCC_TRN_YN ,CRDT_TRN_YN FROM NIC61B WHERE 1=1 AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) M

INSERT /*+ APPEND PARALLEL(KRBA_TRN_I 6) */ INTO KRBA_TRN_I ( BAS_YYMM, GNL_AC_NO, SRVC_G_C, DL_DT, DL_SQ, GDS_NO, RNMCNO, CHNL_CLSN_CODE, DL_CHNNL_CD, DL_TYP_CD, DL_WY_CD, ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE, PRDT_CLSN_CODE, SERV_CLSN_CODE, HANDLNG_BRN_CD, MNGG_BRN_CD, PRFT_BRN_CD, VALT_BRNO, DL_AMT, PECO_TRN_CD, TRDG_CODE,BNCC_TRN_YN,CRDT_TRN_YN, DR_DT, DR_TIME ) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(M 6) */ BAS_YYMM ,GNL_AC_NO ,(CASE WHEN PRDT_CLSN_CODE = 'A' THEN '11' -- 주식 WHEN PRDT_CLSN_CODE = 'B' THEN '12' -- 선물 WHEN PRDT_CLSN_CODE = 'C' THEN '13' -- 옵션 WHEN PRDT_CLSN_CODE = 'D' THEN '14' -- 채권 WHEN PRDT_CLSN_CODE = 'E' THEN '15' -- 파생결합증권 WHEN PRDT_CLSN_CODE = 'F' THEN '16' -- 파생계약상품 WHEN PRDT_CLSN_CODE = 'G' THEN '17' -- 펀드 WHEN PRDT_CLSN_CODE = 'I' THEN '18' -- 신탁 WHEN PRDT_CLSN_CODE = 'K' THEN '19' -- 방카 WHEN PRDT_CLSN_CODE = 'M' THEN '20' -- 단기상품 WHEN PRDT_CLSN_CODE = 'O' THEN '21' -- 일반상품 ELSE '**' END ) SRVC_G_C ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,GDS_NO ,RNMCNO ,CHNL_CLSN_CODE ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_TYP_CD ,DL_WY_CD ,ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE --계좌유형분류 ,PRDT_CLSN_CODE --금융상품분류 ,SERV_CLSN_CODE --금융서비스분류 ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD --처리지점 ,MNGG_BRN_CD --관리지점 ,PRFT_BRN_CD --실적지점 ,(CASE WHEN PRFT_BRN_CD = '21320' THEN MNGG_BRN_CD ELSE NVL(PRFT_BRN_CD,MNGG_BRN_CD) END) VALT_BRNO ,DL_AMT ,PECO_TRN_CD ,TRDG_CODE ,BNCC_TRN_YN ,CRDT_TRN_YN ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT #{basYymm} BAS_YYMM ,GNL_AC_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,GDS_NO ,RNMCNO ,CHNL_CLSN_CODE ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_TYP_CD ,DL_WY_CD ,ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE --계좌유형분류 ,PRDT_CLSN_CODE --금융상품분류 ,SERV_CLSN_CODE --금융서비스분류 ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD --처리지점 ,MNGG_BRN_CD --관리지점 ,PRFT_BRN_CD --실적지점 ,DL_AMT ,PECO_TRN_CD ,TRDG_CODE ,BNCC_TRN_YN ,CRDT_TRN_YN FROM NIC61B WHERE 1=1 AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND GDS_NO NOT IN ('M1210', 'M1211') AND PRDT_CLSN_CODE IS NOT NULL ) M

INSERT /*+ APPEND PARALLEL(KRBA_TRN_I 6) */ INTO KRBA_TRN_I ( BAS_YYMM, GNL_AC_NO, SRVC_G_C, DL_DT, DL_SQ, GDS_NO, RNMCNO, CHNL_CLSN_CODE, DL_CHNNL_CD, DL_TYP_CD, DL_WY_CD, ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE, PRDT_CLSN_CODE, SERV_CLSN_CODE, HANDLNG_BRN_CD, MNGG_BRN_CD, PRFT_BRN_CD, VALT_BRNO, DL_AMT, PECO_TRN_CD, TRDG_CODE,BNCC_TRN_YN,CRDT_TRN_YN, DR_DT, DR_TIME ) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(M 6) */ BAS_YYMM ,GNL_AC_NO ,(CASE WHEN SERV_CLSN_CODE = 'S01' THEN '22' -- 계좌입출금 WHEN SERV_CLSN_CODE = 'S02' THEN '23' -- 신용 WHEN SERV_CLSN_CODE = 'S03' THEN '24' -- IB금융 WHEN SERV_CLSN_CODE = 'S04' THEN '25' -- 인수및중개 ELSE '***' END ) SRVC_G_C ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,GDS_NO ,RNMCNO ,CHNL_CLSN_CODE ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_TYP_CD ,DL_WY_CD ,ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE --계좌유형분류 ,PRDT_CLSN_CODE --금융상품분류 ,SERV_CLSN_CODE --금융서비스분류 ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD --처리지점 ,MNGG_BRN_CD --관리지점 ,PRFT_BRN_CD --실적지점 ,(CASE WHEN PRFT_BRN_CD = '21320' THEN MNGG_BRN_CD ELSE NVL(PRFT_BRN_CD,MNGG_BRN_CD) END) VALT_BRNO ,DL_AMT ,PECO_TRN_CD ,TRDG_CODE ,BNCC_TRN_YN ,CRDT_TRN_YN ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT #{basYymm} BAS_YYMM ,GNL_AC_NO ,DL_DT ,DL_SQ ,GDS_NO ,RNMCNO ,CHNL_CLSN_CODE ,DL_CHNNL_CD ,DL_TYP_CD ,DL_WY_CD ,ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE --계좌유형분류 ,PRDT_CLSN_CODE --금융상품분류 ,SERV_CLSN_CODE --금융서비스분류 ,HANDLNG_BRN_CD --처리지점 ,MNGG_BRN_CD --관리지점 ,PRFT_BRN_CD --실적지점 ,DL_AMT ,PECO_TRN_CD ,TRDG_CODE ,BNCC_TRN_YN ,CRDT_TRN_YN FROM NIC61B WHERE 1=1 AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND SERV_CLSN_CODE IS NOT NULL ) M
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM KRBA_TRN_I WHERE VALT_BRNO IN ('21070' , '23070')
DELETE FROM KRBA_TRN_I WHERE 1=1 AND DL_DT = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE),-12),'YYYYMMDD')
